body:
**Preferred term label:**
occlusal surface of tooth

**Synonyms**
occlusal surface

**Definition (free text, please give PubMed ID)**
A tooth surface structure that forms the biting or grinding surface of a molar or premolar.
cross reference: https://dentaleducationhub.com/surfaces-of-the-teeth/
cross reference: https://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem-FDI-surface.html

**Parent term (use https://www.ebi.ac.uk/ols/ontologies/uberon)**
http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/UBERON_8600148

**Your nano-attribution (ORCID)**
https://orcid.org/0000-0001-9625-1899

@aleixpuigb Not sure how I missed this! Sorry about that :(

comments.body: Hi @wdduncan, no problem, I will add. I also missed it!

@dragon-ai-agent please can you add 'occlusal surface of tooth'. Please can you use the Uberon ID 'UBERON:8600149' and make sure that you add the ORCID? The synonym is an exact synonym and you can use 'https://dentaleducationhub.com/surfaces-of-the-teeth/' to reference it.

title: NTR: occlusal surface of tooth
